hero.headline:
Three Generations of Pool Care
Excellence
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves the same care we'd give our own family's. As a 3rd generation pool service company in Los Angeles and the Inland Empire, we bring decades of handed-down expertise, fair pricing, and the kind of reliability that only a family business can deliver.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block"> Family That Knows Pools
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, we handle every aspect of pool care so you can focus on making memories in your backyard.

cards.title: Monthly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly pool care including chemical balancing, brushing, skimming, and tablet replenishment to keep your pool crystal clear and swim-ready all year round.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pool pumps, motors, filters, heaters, valves, timers, blowers, and pool lights to restore your pool system to peak performance.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pool equipment including heaters, pumps, filters, motorized valves, timers, and lighting systems using quality products from major national distributors.

cards.title: Plumbing & Line Repair
cards.description: Repair and replacement of pool plumbing, valves, and clearing of clogged pool lines to ensure proper water circulation and system efficiency.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Replacement
cards.description: Thorough filter clean-ups and full filter replacements to maintain optimal water filtration and extend the life of your pool equipment.

cards.title: Equipment Troubleshooting
cards.description: Comprehensive diagnostic services to identify and resolve pool equipment issues, including motorized valve synchronization and complex system problems.

steps.title: Call or Text Us
steps.description: Reach out by phone, text, or email and tell us about your pool. We respond quickly — usually the same day — with an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: We Show Up On Schedule
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on time, every time. We handle all cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks with the care your pool deserves.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling clean and swim-ready year-round. If anything ever falls short of your expectations, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why SoCal Families Trust Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Generations of Pool Expertise
about.description: Alec's Pool Service is a 3rd generation, family-owned pool company serving Los Angeles and the Inland Empire. We carry forward decades of handed-down knowledge and treat every client's pool with the same care and courtesy we'd give our own. Fair pricing, reliable scheduling, and prompt communication aren't just promises — they're how we were raised to do business.

features.title: 3rd Generation Family Expertise
features.description: Pool care knowledge passed down through three generations means you get seasoned expertise that no newcomer can match.

features.title: Fair & Transparent Pricing
features.description: We source equipment through major national distributors and pass the savings on. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — ever.

features.title: We Always Return Your Call
features.description: Calls, texts, emails — we respond promptly because your time matters. You'll never feel ignored or left waiting.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing, No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Straightforward rates from a family that believes in honest work at honest prices. No contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our Family-to-Family Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever unsatisfied with our service, we'll come back and make it right at no extra cost. We treat every client like family, and family doesn't cut corners. Your pool will be clean, balanced, and swim-ready — or we'll keep working until it is.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. Just give us a call or text at (909) 527-0737 and we'll find a time that works for you.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Los Angeles, Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, Alta Loma, Moreno Valley, Rialto, Fontana, and surrounding Inland Empire communities. If you're not sure whether you're in our range, just ask — we're happy to check.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're out. You can always reach us by call, text, or email if you have questions about your service.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Alec's Pool Service is a BBB Accredited Business, fully insured, and we accept all major credit cards. Your property and peace of mind are always protected.

faqs.question: What if I need an equipment repair?
faqs.answer: We handle everything from pump and heater repairs to full equipment installations. We source quality products from major national distributors at competitive prices, so you get expert work without overpaying.

testimonials.name: Maria L.
testimonials.text: He does excellent pool servicing. Our water is always clear and clean. We also hire him for equipment and remodeling, and he is always fair and does the best job that he can.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: My neighbor recommended Alex and I ended up hiring him to replace my heater and my pool pump. His prices were fair, and he did quality work. I now use him regularly to maintain my pool.

testimonials.name: Jennifer K.
testimonials.text: Very reliable and friendly! Always shows up on time and our pool has never looked better. Highly recommend for anyone in the area looking for dependable pool service.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from a 3rd generation pool family. We'll respond quickly — usually the same day — with honest pricing and zero obligations.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
